scripts.smoke: rm -rf allure-results; npx playwright test tests/LoginTest.spec.js tests/RegistrationTest.spec.js ; cp -r reports/history allure-results/history 2>/dev/null; allure generate allure-results --clean -o reports && allure open reports
scripts.smoke:headed: rm -rf allure-results; npx playwright test tests/LoginTest.spec.js tests/RegistrationTest.spec.js --headed; cp -r reports/history allure-results/history 2>/dev/null; allure generate allure-results --clean -o reports && allure open reports
scripts.smoke:headedChrome: rm -rf allure-results; npx playwright test tests/LoginTest.spec.js tests/RegistrationTest.spec.js --headed --project=chromium; cp -r reports/history allure-results/history 2>/dev/null; allure generate allure-results --clean -o reports && allure open reports
scripts.smoke:headedFirefox: rm -rf allure-results; npx playwright test tests/LoginTest.spec.js tests/RegistrationTest.spec.js --headed --project=firefox; cp -r reports/history allure-results/history 2>/dev/null; allure generate allure-results --clean -o reports && allure open reports
scripts.smoke:headedWebkit: rm -rf allure-results; npx playwright test tests/LoginTest.spec.js tests/RegistrationTest.spec.js --headed --project=webkit; cp -r reports/history allure-results/history 2>/dev/null; allure generate allure-results --clean -o reports && allure open reports
scripts.regression: rm -rf allure-results; npx playwright test tests/LoginTest.spec.js tests/RegistrationTest.spec.js npx playwright test tests/CategoryTest.spec.js tests/CourseTest.spec.js; cp -r reports/history allure-results/history 2>/dev/null; allure generate allure-results --clean -o reports && allure open reports
scripts.regression:headed: rm -rf allure-results; npx playwright test tests/CategoryTest.spec.js tests/CourseTest.spec.js --headed; cp -r reports/history allure-results/history 2>/dev/null; allure generate allure-results --clean -o reports && allure open reports
